autoswitch: Part of auto switch group "%s"$Recipe changes based on first ingredient
block.hbmsntm.gravel_diamond.desc: There is some kind of joke here,$but I can't quite tell what it is.$$Update, 2020-07-04:$We deny any implications of a joke on$the basis that it was so severely unfunny$that people started stabbing their eyes out.$$Update, 2020-17-04:$As it turns out, "Diamond Gravel" was$never really a thing, rendering what might$have been a joke as totally nonsensical.$We apologize for getting your hopes up with$this non-joke that hasn't been made.$$i added an item for a joke that isn't even here, what am i, stupid? can't even tell the difference between gravel and a gavel, how did i not forget how to breathe yet?
block.hbmsntm.machine_battery_socket.des: Allows battery items to be connected$to the power grid directly.$Acts as a cable, all ports are connected$to the same network.
block.hbmsntm.nuke_prototype.desc: It didn't have to be like this.$ $You monster.
block.hbmsntm.obj_no_spawn.desc: Mobs cannot spawn on this block!
block.hbmsntm.plushie.yomi.desc: Hi! Can I be your rabbit friend
block.hbmsntm.taint.desc: DO NOT TOUCH, BREATHE OR STARE AT.

container.sat_linker.desc.rand: The third slot will randomize the$satellite/chip's frequency.
container.soyuz_launcher.module_here: The orbital module for special payloads

item.hbmsntm.black_hole.desc: Contains a regular singularity$in the center. Large enough to$stay stable. It's not the end$of the world as we know it,$and I don't feel fine.
item.hbmsntm.bomb_caller.desc: Aim & click to call an airstrike!
item.hbmsntm.bottle_opener.desc: My very own bottle opener.$Use with caution!
item.hbmsntm.burnt_bark.desc: A piece of bark from an exploded golden oak tree.
item.hbmsntm.canned_beef.desc: A few centuries ago, a cow died for this.
item.hbmsntm.canned_bhole.desc: Made from actual singularities. No, really.
item.hbmsntm.canned_cheese.desc: Is it cheese? Is it rubber cement? Who knows, who cares.
item.hbmsntm.canned_chinese.desc: In China, Chinese food is just called food.
item.hbmsntm.canned_diesel.desc: I'm slowly running out of jokes for these.
item.hbmsntm.canned_fried.desc: Even the can is deep fried!
item.hbmsntm.canned_hotdogs.desc: Not to be confused with cool cats.
item.hbmsntm.canned_kerosene.desc: Just imagine a witty line here.
item.hbmsntm.canned_milk.desc: Milk 2: More solid than ever before!
item.hbmsntm.canned_mystery.desc: What's inside? Only one way to find out!
item.hbmsntm.canned_napalm.desc: I love the smell of old memes in the morning!
item.hbmsntm.canned_oil.desc: It makes motors go, so why not humans?
item.hbmsntm.canned_spam.desc: The three-and-a-half-minute sketch is set in the fictional Green Midget Cafe in Bromley.$An argument develops between the waitress, who recites a menu in which nearly$every dish contains Spam, and Mrs. Bun, who does not like Spam. She asks for a$dish without Spam, much to the amazement of her Spam-loving husband. The waitress$responds to this request with disgust. Mr. Bun offers to take her Spam instead,$and asks for a dish containing a lot of Spam and baked beans. The waitress says$no since they are out of baked beans; when Mr. Bun asks for a substitution of Spam,$the waitress again responds with disgust. At several points, a group of Vikings in$the restaurant interrupts conversation by loudly singing about Spam.$The irate waitress orders them to shut up, but they resume singing more loudly.$A Hungarian tourist comes to the counter, trying to order by using a wholly$inaccurate Hungarian/English phrasebook (a reference to a previous sketch).$He is rapidly escorted away by a police constable. The sketch abruptly cuts to a$historian in a television studio talking about the origin of the Vikings in the café.$As he goes on, he begins to increasingly insert the word "Spam" into every$sentence, and the backdrop is raised to reveal the restaurant set behind.$The historian joins the Vikings in their song, and Mr. and Mrs. Bun are lifted by$wires out of the scene while the singing continues. In the original televised performance,$the closing credits begin to scroll with the singing still audible in the background.
item.hbmsntm.canned_tomato.desc: Who wants some thick red paste?
item.hbmsntm.canned_tuna.desc: I can't tell if that's actually tuna or dried cement.
item.hbmsntm.cell_anti_schrabidium.desc: Warning: Exposure to matter will$create a fólkvangr field!
item.hbmsntm.cell_antimatter.desc: Warning: Exposure to matter will$lead to violent annihilation!
item.hbmsntm.chocolate_milk.desc: Regular chocolate milk. Safe to drink.$Totally not made from nitroglycerine.
item.hbmsntm.detonator.desc: Shift right-click to set position,$right-click to detonate!
item.hbmsntm.detonator_deadman.desc: Shift right-click to set position,$drop to detonate!
item.hbmsntm.detonator_multi.desc: Shift right-click block to add position,$right-click to detonate!$Shift right-click in the air to clear positions.
item.hbmsntm.drink.breen.desc: Don't drink the water. They put something in it, to make you forget.$I don't even know how I got here.
item.hbmsntm.drink.cherry.desc: Now with severe radiation poisoning in every seventh bottle!
item.hbmsntm.drink.creature.desc: Basically gasoline in a tin can
item.hbmsntm.drink.luna.desc: Contains actual selenium and star metal. Tastes like night.
item.hbmsntm.drink.mrsugar.desc: An intellectual drink, for the chosen ones!
item.hbmsntm.drink.overcharge.desc: Possible side effects include heart attacks, seizures or zombification
item.hbmsntm.drink.quantum.desc: Comes with a colorful mix of over 70 isotopes!
item.hbmsntm.drink.sparkle.desc: The most delicious beverage in the wasteland!
item.hbmsntm.early_explosive_lenses.desc: Assembly of 8 high-explosive lenses with an aluminium$pusher, duraluminium shell, and bridgewire detonators.
item.hbmsntm.explosive_lenses.desc: Assembly of 8 PBX lenses with a thin$aluminium pusher, duraluminium shell, and$miniaturized bridgewire detonators.
item.hbmsntm.igniter.desc: (Used by right-clicking the Prototype)$It's a green metal handle with a$bright red button and a small lid.$At the bottom, the initials N.E. are$engraved. Whoever N.E. was, he had$a great taste in shades of green.
item.hbmsntm.ingot_euphemium.desc: A very special and yet strange element.
item.hbmsntm.ingot_schraranium.desc: Made from uranium in a schrabidium transmutator
item.hbmsntm.missile_volcano.desc: Using the power of nuclear explosives, we can summon a volcano!
item.hbmsntm.obj_bomb_caller.call.unload: Airstrike can't be called in unloaded chunks!
item.hbmsntm.obj_cigarette.desc0: ✓ Asbestos filter$✓ High in tar$✓ Tobacco contains 100%% Polonium-210$✓ Yum
item.hbmsntm.obj_cigarette.desc1: This can't be good for me, but I feel
item.hbmsntm.obj_polaroid.fate18: Duchess of the boxcars.$$"P.S.: Thirty-one."$"Huh, what does thirty-one mean?"
item.hbmsntm.obj_polaroid.fate5: If you stare long into the abyss, the abyss stares back.
item.hbmsntm.pellet_antimatter.desc: Very heavy antimatter cluster.$Gets rid of black holes.
item.hbmsntm.pin.desc: Standard success rate of picking a regular lock is ~10%%.
item.hbmsntm.satellite_laser.desc: Allows to summon lasers with a 15 second cooldown.
item.hbmsntm.satellite_radar.desc: Shows a map of active entities.
item.hbmsntm.singularity.desc: You may be asking:$"But HBM, a manifold with an undefined$state of spacetime? How is this possible?"$Long answer short:$"I have no idea!"
item.hbmsntm.singularity_counter_resonan: Nullifies resonance of objects in$non-euclidean space, creates variable$gravity well. Spontaneously spawns$tesseracts. If a tesseract happens to$appear near you, do not look directly$at it.
item.hbmsntm.singularity_super_heated.de: Continuously heats up matter by$resonating every planck second.$Tends to catch fire or to create$small plasma arcs. Not edible.
